title: lathyrus luteus var. occidentalis
intro: Lathyrus luteus var. occidentalis, also known as the Western yellow pea or wild pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lathyrus luteus var. occidentalis are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, or added to supplements and food products due to its nutritional value and potential medicinal properties.
